channel.title: Block Odds Lab
channel.description: Bitcoin lottery-mining odds, Bitaxe and NerdMiner calculators, and practical solo mining guides.

item.title: July 24 Bitaxe Gamma Discovery Push
item.description: Added a fresh Gamma discovery snippet that routes product-video interest into measured hashrate, wall watts, yearly chance, the Gamma odds route, and the Bitaxe calculator.

item.title: July 23 Calculator Discovery Refresh
item.description: Refreshed the Bitcoin solo mining calculator defaults, sitemap dates, Bitaxe Gamma route, NerdMiner route, and difficulty tracker so Google and readers see the current calculator paths.

item.title: July 23 Bitaxe Gamma Buyer Route
item.description: Updated the Gamma community signal and share kit with a fresh buyer-intent route from the TikTok product video into Gamma odds, Bitaxe setup math, and the starter-kit path.

item.title: NerdMiner Possible vs Probable Route
item.description: Added a Day 2 Substack-ready traffic angle that uses NerdMiner odds to explain why technically possible block finds still need base-rate context.

item.title: Sunday Bitaxe Gamma Buyer Path
item.description: Added a low-hype Sunday Gamma traffic reply that routes product-video viewers into one-board versus two-board odds, wall watts, and calculator checks.

item.title: Bitaxe Jackpot Odds Reality Check
item.description: A clear base-rate check for the $200K Bitaxe Gamma solo mining jackpot story, with routes into Gamma odds, tuning, and second-board math.

item.title: Bitaxe Gamma Community Signal
item.description: Added crawlable links to the Gamma Substack Note, BitcoinTalk Hardware reply, TikTok Shop video, and Bitaxe Gamma odds route.

item.title: Bitaxe Gamma TikTok Sales Signal
item.description: Added a Gamma-specific buyer path that connects the TikTok Shop video to honest Bitaxe odds, watts, tuning, and second-board decision math.

item.title: Fresh Bitcoin Mining Share Prompts
item.description: Added fresh Substack and Bitcoin mining community prompts for calculator indexing, second-miner reality checks, and learning-value lottery mining conversations.

item.title: Block Odds Lab Notes Hub
item.description: A crawlable bridge from Block Odds Lab calculators, starter-kit pages, and share routes to ongoing Bitcoin lottery-mining notes on Substack.

item.title: Bitcoin Lottery Mining Starter Kit FAQ Update
item.description: Updated starter-kit guidance for Bitaxe, NerdMiner, power, cooling, meters, solo pool setup, and when a second miner actually makes sense.

item.title: Bitcoin Lottery Mining Starter Kit
item.description: A practical setup path for small Bitcoin lottery miners: odds first, then power, cooling, measurement, pool setup, and sane upgrade decisions.

item.title: Bitaxe Gamma Odds Calculator
item.description: Bitaxe Gamma hashrate, watts, yearly Bitcoin block odds, power cost, and whether another Gamma meaningfully moves the needle.

item.title: Block Odds Calculator FAQ Update
item.description: Updated block odds calculator guide with clearer FAQ answers for Bitcoin solo mining odds, expected time, and small-miner block probability.

item.title: Bitaxe Odds Calculator FAQ Update
item.description: Updated Bitaxe odds calculator guide with clearer answers for Bitaxe block odds, tuning tradeoffs, and whether another board moves the needle.

item.title: July 18-20 Bitaxe Gamma Weekend Challenge
item.description: A fresh July 18-20 prompt for Bitaxe Gamma, NerdMiner, and small solo miners to run odds before chasing the $200K jackpot story, buying a second board, or tuning for the weekend.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Explained
item.description: Updated guide explaining why difficulty retargets make old Bitaxe, NerdMiner, and solo-mining odds screenshots stale.

item.title: Is Bitcoin Lottery Mining Profitable?
item.description: Updated profitability reality check with stronger calculator routes for solo mining and Bitaxe buying decisions.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Tracker
item.description: Track the next Bitcoin difficulty adjustment, remaining blocks, estimated retarget date, and when to rerun solo mining odds.

item.title: Bitcoin Mining Calculator Share Kit
item.description: Copy-ready posts, canonical links, and audience routes for sharing Block Odds Lab in Reddit, Discord, TikTok, Substack, and creator conversations.

item.title: Block Odds Calculator for Bitcoin Solo Mining
item.description: Estimate Bitcoin solo mining odds, expected time to find a block, daily/monthly/yearly chance, expected BTC, power cost, and hardware payback.

item.title: Bitaxe Odds Calculator
item.description: Bitaxe Gamma odds, watts, tuning stability, yearly probability, and upgrade sanity checks.

item.title: NerdMiner Bitcoin Odds
item.description: A beginner-friendly reality check for NerdMiner odds, learning value, desk mining, and Bitcoin lottery mining expectations.
